# pipenv
#   According to pypa/pipenv#598, it is recommended to include Pipfile.lock in version control.
#   However, in case of collaboration, if having platform-specific dependencies or dependencies
#   having no cross-platform support, pipenv may install dependencies that don't work, or not
#   install all needed dependencies.
#Pipfile.lock

# poetry
#   Similar to Pipfile.lock, it is generally recommended to include poetry.lock in version control.
#   This is especially recommended for binary packages to ensure reproducibility, and is more
#   commonly ignored for libraries.
#   https://python-poetry.org/docs/basic-usage/#commit-your-poetrylock-file-to-version-control

# File: /Users/adam/Downloads/PyXA-main/PyXA/PyXA/Additions/Learn.py
# Language: python

from typing import Union
import Foundation
import LatentSemanticMapping
from PyXA import XABase

class XALSM:
    def __init__((
        self, dataset: Union[dict[str, list[str]], None] = None, from_file: bool = False
    )):
        """Initializes a Latent Semantic Mapping environment."""
    def __add_category((self, category: str)) -> int:
    def save((self, file_path: Union[XABase.XAPath, str])) -> bool:
        """Saves the map to an external file."""
    def load((file_path: Union[XABase.XAPath, str])) -> "XALSM":
        """Loads a map from an external file."""
    def add_category((
        self, name: str, initial_data: Union[list[str], None] = None
    )) -> int:
        """Adds a new category to the map, optionally filling the category with initial text data."""
    def add_data((self, data: dict[Union[int, str], list[str]])) -> list[int]:
        """Adds the provided data, organized by category, to the active map."""
    def add_text((self, text: str, category: Union[int, str], weight: float = 1)):
        """Adds the given text to the specified category, applying an optional weight."""
    def categorize_query((
        self, query: str, num_results: int = 1
    )) -> list[tuple[int, float]]:
        """Categorizes the query based on the current weights in the map."""

def __init__((
        self, dataset: Union[dict[str, list[str]], None] = None, from_file: bool = False
    )):
    """Initializes a Latent Semantic Mapping environment."""

def __add_category((self, category: str)) -> int:

def save((self, file_path: Union[XABase.XAPath, str])) -> bool:
    """Saves the map to an external file."""

def load((file_path: Union[XABase.XAPath, str])) -> "XALSM":
    """Loads a map from an external file."""

def add_category((
        self, name: str, initial_data: Union[list[str], None] = None
    )) -> int:
    """Adds a new category to the map, optionally filling the category with initial text data."""

def add_data((self, data: dict[Union[int, str], list[str]])) -> list[int]:
    """Adds the provided data, organized by category, to the active map."""

def add_text((self, text: str, category: Union[int, str], weight: float = 1)):
    """Adds the given text to the specified category, applying an optional weight."""

def categorize_query((
        self, query: str, num_results: int = 1
    )) -> list[tuple[int, float]]:
    """Categorizes the query based on the current weights in the map."""

class XACommandDetector:
    """A command-based query detector."""
    def __init__((
        self, command_function_map: Union[dict[str, Callable[[], Any]], None] = None
    )):
        """Creates a command detector object."""
    def on_detect((self, command: str, function: Callable[[], Any])):
        """Adds or replaces a command to listen for upon calling :func:`listen`, and associates the given funct..."""
    def listen((self)) -> Any:
        """Begins listening for the specified commands."""

class NSSpeechRecognizerDelegate(A, p, p, K, i, t, ., N, S, O, b, j, e, c, t):
    def speechRecognizer_didRecognizeCommand_((self, recognizer, cmd)):

class XASpeechRecognizer:
    """A rule-based query detector."""
    def __init__((
        self,
        finish_conditions: Union[
            None, dict[Callable[[str], bool], Callable[[str], bool]]
        ] = None,
    )):
        """Creates a speech recognizer object."""
    def __prepare((self)):
    def on_detect((self, rule: Callable[[str], bool], method: Callable[[str], bool])):
        """Sets the given rule to call the specified method if a spoken query passes the rule."""
    def listen((self)) -> Any:
        """Begins listening for a query until a rule returns True."""

class XASpeech:
    def __init__((
        self,
        message: str = "",
        voice: Union[str, None] = None,
        volume: float = 0.5,
        rate: int = 200,
    )):
    def voices((self)) -> list[str]:
        """Gets the list of voice names available on the system."""
    def speak((self, path: Union[str, XABase.XAPath, None, list[str]] = None)):
        """Speaks the provided message using the desired voice, volume, and speaking rate."""

    """Begins listening for the specified commands."""

# File: /Users/adam/Downloads/PyXA-main/PyXA/PyXA/Additions/UI.py
# Language: python

from datetime import datetime, timedelta
from enum import Enum
from time import sleep
from typing import Any, Callable, Union, Literal
import AppKit
from PyObjCTools import AppHelper
from PyXA import XABase

class XASwitch:
    """A switch UI element. Wrapper around AppKit.NSSwitch functionality."""
    def __init__((
        self,
        action: Union[Callable[["XASwitch", int, Any], None], None] = None,
        args: Union[list[Any], None] = None,
    )):
        """Initializes a switch object."""
    def run_action_((self, slider, _)):
        """Runs the action method attached to the switch."""
    def toggle((self)):
        """Toggles the switch on or off."""

class XASlider:
    """A slider UI element. Wrapper around AppKit.NSSlider functionality."""
    def __init__((
        self,
        action: Union[Callable[["XASlider", int, Any], None], None] = None,
        args: Union[list[Any], None] = None,
        value: float = 50.0,
        min_value: float = 0,
        max_value: float = 100,
    )):
        """Initializes a new slider object."""
    def run_action_((self, slider, _)):
        """Runs the action method associated with the slider."""

class XASegmentedControl:
    """A segmented control UI element. Wrapper around AppKit.NSSegmentedControl functionality."""
    def __init__((
        self,
        segments: Union[list[str], list[XABase.XAImage]],
        action: Union[Callable[["XASlider", int, Any], None], None] = None,
        args: Union[list[Any], None] = None,
        multiselect: bool = False,
    )):
        """Initializes a new slider object."""
    def run_action_((self, slider, _)):
        """Runs the action method associated with the segmented control."""

class XAHUD:
    """A momentary HUD window that displays a message to the user."""
    def __init__((
        self,
        message: str,
        font_size: int = 20,
        duration: float = 3.0,
        background_color: Union["XABase.XAColor", None] = None,
        text_color: Union["XABase.XAColor", None] = None,
    )):
    def display((self)):
        """Displays the HUD in the center of the screen."""

class XAAlert:
    """A class for creating and interacting with an alert dialog window."""
    def __init__((
        self,
        title: str = "Alert!",
        message: str = "",
        buttons=["Ok", "Cancel"],
        icon: Union["XABase.XAImage", None] = None,
    )):
        """Initializes an alert object."""
    def __display((self)):
    def display((self)) -> int:
        """Displays the alert. ..."""

class XANotification:
    """A class for managing and interacting with notifications."""
    def __init__((
        self,
        text: str,
        title: Union[str, None] = None,
        subtitle: Union[str, None] = None,
        image: Union["XABase.XAImage", None] = None,
        sound_name: Union[str, None] = None,
        primary_button_title: Union[str, None] = None,
        show_reply_button: bool = False,
        click_action: Union[Callable[[], None], None] = None,
        primary_action: Union[Callable[[], None], None] = None,
        reply_action: Union[Callable[[], None], None] = None,
        timeout: float = -1,
    )):
        """Initializes a notification object."""
    def display((self)):
        """Displays the notification."""

class NotificationCenterDelegate(A, p, p, K, i, t, ., N, S, O, b, j, e, c, t):
    def userNotificationCenter_didActivateNotification_((self, nc, notification)):

class XAMenuBar:
    def __init__((self)):
        """Creates a new menu bar object for interacting with the system menu bar."""
    def new_menu((
        self,
        content: Union[
            str, int, float, XABase.XAImage, XABase.XAURL, XABase.XAPath, None
        ] = None,
        icon: Union[XABase.XAImage, None] = None,
        tooltip: Union[str, None] = None,
        icon_dimensions: tuple[int, int] = (30, 30),
        action: Callable[["XAMenuBarMenu", None], None] = None,
        id: Union[str, None] = None,
        index: int = -1,
    )) -> "XAMenuBarMenu":

class XAObject:
    """A general class for PyXA scripting objects."""
    def __init__((self, properties: dict = None)):
        """Instantiates a PyXA scripting object."""
    def _exec_suppresed((self, f: Callable[..., Any], *args: Any)) -> Any:
        """Silences unwanted and otherwise unavoidable warning messages."""
    def _new_element((
        self, obj: "AppKit.NSObject", obj_class: type = "XAObject", *args: list[Any]
    )) -> "XAObject":
        """Wrapper for creating a new PyXA object."""
    def _spawn_thread((
        self,
        function: Callable[..., Any],
        args: Union[list[Any], None] = None,
        kwargs: Union[list[Any], None] = None,
        daemon: bool = True,
    )) -> threading.Thread:
        """Spawns a new thread running the specified function."""
    def set_properties((self, properties: dict)) -> "XAObject":
        """Updates the value of multiple properties of the scripting element associated with this object."""
    def set_property((self, property_name: str, value: Any)) -> "XAObject":
        """Updates the value of a single property of the scripting element associated with this object."""
    def exists((self)) -> bool:
        """Returns true if the scripting object referenced by this PyXA object exists, false otherwise."""
    def __eq__((self, other: "XAObject")):

class XAList(X, A, O, b, j, e, c, t):
    """A wrapper around NSArray and NSMutableArray objects enabling fast enumeration and lazy evaluation of..."""
    def __init__((
        self,
        properties: dict,
        object_class: type = None,
        filter: Union[dict, None] = None,
    )):
        """Creates an efficient wrapper object around a list of scriptable elements."""
    def by_property((self, property: str, value: Any)) -> XAObject:
        """Retrieves the first element whose property value matches the given value, if one exists."""
    def _format_for_filter((self, filter, value1, value2=None)):
    def map((self, function: Callable[[object], object])) -> "XAList":
        """Applies the given function to each element in the list and returns a new :class:`XAList` containing ..."""
    def equalling((self, property: str, value: str)) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose property value equals the given value."""
    def not_equalling((self, property: str, value: str)) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose property value does not equal the given value."""
    def containing((self, property: str, value: str)) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose property value contains the given value."""
    def not_containing((self, property: str, value: str)) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose property value does not contain the given value."""
    def beginning_with((self, property: str, value: str)) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose property value begins with the given value."""
    def ending_with((self, property: str, value: str)) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose property value ends with the given value."""
    def greater_than((self, property: str, value: Union[int, float])) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose property value is greater than the given value."""
    def less_than((self, property: str, value: Union[int, float])) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose property value is less than the given value."""
    def between((
        self, property: str, value1: Union[int, float], value2: Union[int, float]
    )) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose property value is between the given values."""
    def exists((self, property: str)) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose specified property value exists."""
    def not_exists((self, property: str)) -> "XAList":
        """Retrieves all elements whose specified property value does not exist."""
    def filter((
        self,
        filter: str,
        comparison_operation: Union[str, None] = None,
        value1: Union[Any, None] = None,
        value2: Union[Any, None] = None,
    )) -> "XAList":
        """Filters the list by the given parameters."""
    def at((self, index: int)) -> XAObject:
        """Retrieves the element at the specified index."""
    def shuffle((self)) -> "XAList":
        """Randomizes the order of objects in the list."""
    def extend((self, ls: Union["XAList", list])):
        """Appends all elements of the supplied list to the end of this list."""
    def push((self, *elements: list[XAObject])) -> Union[XAObject, list[XAObject], None]:
        """Appends the object referenced by the provided PyXA wrapper to the end of the list."""
    def insert((self, element: XAObject, index: int)):
        """Inserts the object referenced by the provided PyXA wrapper at the specified index."""
    def pop((self, index: int = -1)) -> XAObject:
        """Removes the object at the specified index from the list and returns it."""
    def index((self, element: XAObject)) -> int:
        """Returns the index of the first occurrence of the element in the list, or -1 if no such element exist..."""
    def count((self, count_function: Callable[[object], bool])) -> int:
        """Counts the number of entries in the list for which the provided function is True."""
    def __getitem__((self, key: Union[int, slice])):
    def __len__((self)):
    def __reversed__((self)):
    def __iter__((self)):
    def __contains__((self, item)):
    def __repr__((self)):

        """Inserts the supplied string, list of strings, or script as a line entry in the script starting at th..."""

        """Removes the line at the given index from the script."""

        """Loads an AppleScript (.scpt) file as a runnable AppleScript object."""

        """Compiles and runs the script, returning the result."""
    def __repr__((self)):

class XAPredicate(X, A, O, b, j, e, c, t, ,,  , X, A, C, l, i, p, b, o, a, r, d, C, o, d, a, b, l, e):

        target: Union["AppKit.NSArray", XAList], properties_dict: dict
    )) -> "AppKit.NSArray":

        """Inserts a `<=` condition to the predicate format at the desired location, specified by index."""
    def add_gt_condition((self, property: str, value: Any)):

        """Inserts a `<` condition to the predicate format at the desired location, specified by index."""
    def add_between_condition((
        self, property: str, value1: Union[int, float], value2: Union[int, float]
    )):
        """Appends a `BETWEEN` condition to the end of the predicate format."""

    )):

class XAURL(X, A, O, b, j, e, c, t, ,,  , X, A, C, l, i, p, b, o, a, r, d, C, o, d, a, b, l, e):
    """A URL using any scheme recognized by the system. This can be a file URL."""

        """Opens the URL in the appropriate default application."""

class XAText(X, A, O, b, j, e, c, t):
    """A class for managing and interacting with the text of documents."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def tag_parts_of_speech((
        self, unit: Literal["word", "sentence", "paragraph", "document"] = "word"
    )) -> list[tuple[str, str]]:
        """Tags each word of the text with its associated part of speech."""
    def tag_languages((
        self, unit: Literal["word", "sentence", "paragraph", "document"] = "paragraph"
    )) -> list[tuple[str, str]]:
        """Tags each paragraph of the text with its language."""
    def tag_entities((
        self, unit: Literal["word", "sentence", "paragraph", "document"] = "word"
    )) -> list[tuple[str, str]]:
        """Tags each word of the text with either the category of entity it represents (i.e. person, place, or ..."""
    def tag_lemmas((
        self, unit: Literal["word", "sentence", "paragraph", "document"] = "word"
    )) -> list[tuple[str, str]]:
        """Tags each word of the text with its stem word."""
    def tag_sentiments((
        self,
        sentiment_scale: list[str] = None,
        unit: Literal["word", "sentence", "paragraph", "document"] = "paragraph",
    )) -> list[tuple[str, str]]:
        """Tags each paragraph of the text with a sentiment rating."""
    def extract_urls((self)) -> list["XAURL"]:
        """Gets a list of URLs in the text."""
    def extract_dates((self)) -> list["XADatetimeBlock"]:
        """Gets a list of dates and durations in the text."""
    def extract_addresses((self)):
        """Gets a list of addresses in the text."""
    def extract_phone_numbers((self)):
        """Gets a list of phone numbers in the text."""
    def paragraphs((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAParagraphList":
        """Gets a list of paragraphs in the text."""
    def sentences((self)) -> "XASentenceList":
        """Gets a list of sentences in the text."""
    def words((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAWordList":
        """Gets a list of words in the text."""
    def characters((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XACharacterList":
        """Gets a list of characters in the text."""
    def attribute_runs((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAAttributeRunList":
        """Gets a list of attribute runs in the text. For formatted text, this returns all sequences of charact..."""
    def attachments((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAAttachmentList":
        """Gets a list of attachments of the text."""
    def __len__((self)):
    def __str__((self)):
    def __repr__((self)):

    def by_short_version((self, short_version: str)) -> Union["XAFile", None]:
    def by_stationery((self, stationery: bool)) -> Union["XAFile", None]:
    def by_type_identifier((self, type_identifier: str)) -> Union["XAFile", None]:
    def by_version((self, version: str)) -> Union["XAFile", None]:

class XAImageList(X, A, L, i, s, t, ,,  , X, A, C, l, i, p, b, o, a, r, d, C, o, d, a, b, l, e):
    """A wrapper around lists of images that employs fast enumeration techniques."""
    def __init__((
        self, properties: dict, filter: Union[dict, None] = None, obj_class=None
    )):
    def __partial_init((self)):
    def __apply_filter((self, filter_block, *args)):
    def file((self)) -> list[XAPath]:
    def horizontal_stitch((self)) -> "XAImage":
        """Horizontally stacks each image in the list."""
    def vertical_stitch((self)) -> "XAImage":
        """Vertically stacks each image in the list."""
    def additive_composition((self)) -> "XAImage":
        """Creates a composition image by adding the color values of each image in the list."""
    def subtractive_composition((self)) -> "XAImage":
        """Creates a composition image by subtracting the color values of each image in the list successively."""
    def edges((self, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Detects the edges in each image of the list and highlights them colorfully, blackening other areas o..."""
    def gaussian_blur((self, intensity: float = 10)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Blurs each image in the list using a Gaussian filter."""
    def reduce_noise((
        self, noise_level: float = 0.02, sharpness: float = 0.4
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Reduces noise in each image of the list by sharpening areas with a luminance delta below the specifi..."""
    def pixellate((self, pixel_size: float = 8.0)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Pixellates each image in the list."""
    def outline((self, threshold: float = 0.1)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Outlines detected edges within each image of the list in black, leaving the rest transparent."""
    def invert((self)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Inverts the colors of each image in the list."""
    def sepia((self, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Applies a sepia filter to each image in the list; maps all colors of the images to shades of brown."""
    def vignette((self, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Applies vignette shading to the corners of each image in the list."""
    def depth_of_field((
        self,
        focal_region: Union[tuple[tuple[int, int], tuple[int, int]], None] = None,
        intensity: float = 10.0,
        focal_region_saturation: float = 1.5,
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Applies a depth of field filter to each image in the list, simulating a tilt & shift effect."""
    def crystallize((self, crystal_size: float = 20.0)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Applies a crystallization filter to each image in the list. Creates polygon-shaped color blocks by a..."""
    def comic((self)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Applies a comic filter to each image in the list. Outlines edges and applies a color halftone effect..."""
    def pointillize((self, point_size: float = 20.0)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Applies a pointillization filter to each image in the list."""
    def bloom((self, intensity: float = 0.5)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Applies a bloom effect to each image in the list. Softens edges and adds a glow."""
    def monochrome((self, color: XAColor, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Remaps the colors of each image in the list to shades of the specified color."""
    def bump((
        self,
        center: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None,
        radius: float = 300.0,
        curvature: float = 0.5,
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Adds a concave (inward) or convex (outward) bump to each image in the list at the specified location..."""
    def pinch((
        self, center: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None, intensity: float = 0.5
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Adds an inward pinch distortion to each image in the list at the specified location within each imag..."""
    def twirl((
        self,
        center: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None,
        radius: float = 300.0,
        angle: float = 3.14,
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Adds a twirl distortion to each image in the list by rotating pixels around the specified location w..."""
    def auto_enhance((
        self,
        correct_red_eye: bool = False,
        crop_to_features: bool = False,
        correct_rotation: bool = False,
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Attempts to enhance each image in the list by applying suggested filters."""
    def flip_horizontally((self)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Flips each image in the list horizontally."""
    def flip_vertically((self)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Flips each image in the list vertically."""
    def rotate((self, degrees: float)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Rotates each image in the list by the specified amount of degrees."""
    def crop((
        self, size: tuple[int, int], corner: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Crops each image in the list to the specified dimensions."""
    def scale((
        self, scale_factor_x: float, scale_factor_y: Union[float, None] = None
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Scales each image in the list by the specified horizontal and vertical factors."""
    def resize((self, width: int, height: Union[int, None] = None)) -> "XAImageList":
        """Resizes each image in the list to the specified width and height."""
    def pad((
        self,
        horizontal_border_width: int = 50,
        vertical_border_width: int = 50,
        pad_color: Union[XAColor, None] = None,
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Pads each image in the list with the specified color; add a border around each image in the list wit..."""
    def overlay_image((
        self,
        image: "XAImage",
        location: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None,
        size: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None,
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Overlays an image on top of each image in the list, at the specified location, with the specified si..."""
    def overlay_text((
        self,
        text: str,
        location: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None,
        font_size: float = 12,
        font_color: Union[XAColor, None] = None,
    )) -> "XAImageList":
        """Overlays text of the specified size and color at the provided location within each image of the list..."""
    def extract_text((self)) -> list[str]:
        """Extracts and returns a list of all visible text in each image of the list."""
    def show_in_preview((self)):
        """Opens each image in the list in Preview."""
    def save((self, file_paths: list[Union[XAPath, str]])):
        """Saves each image to a file on the disk."""
    def get_clipboard_representation((self)) -> list["AppKit.NSImage"]:
        """Gets a clipboard-codable representation of each image in the list."""

class XAImage(m, a, c, i, m, g, ., I, m, a, g, e, ,,  , X, A, O, b, j, e, c, t, ,,  , X, A, C, l, i, p, b, o, a, r, d, C, o, d, a, b, l, e):
    """A wrapper around NSImage with specialized automation methods."""
    def __init__((
        self,
        image_reference: Union[
            str, XAPath, "AppKit.NSURL", "AppKit.NSImage", None
        ] = None,
    )):
    def open((
        *images: Union[str, XAPath, list[Union[str, XAPath]]]
    )) -> Union["XAImage", XAImageList]:
        """Initializes one or more images from files."""
    def horizontal_stitch((images: Union[list["XAImage"], XAImageList])) -> "XAImage":
        """Horizontally stacks two or more images."""
    def vertical_stitch((images: Union[list["XAImage"], XAImageList])) -> "XAImage":
        """Vertically stacks two or more images."""
    def edges((self, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImage":
        """Detects the edges in the image and highlights them colorfully, blackening other areas of the image."""
    def gaussian_blur((self, intensity: float = 10)) -> "XAImage":
        """Blurs the image using a Gaussian filter."""
    def reduce_noise((
        self, noise_level: float = 0.02, sharpness: float = 0.4
    )) -> "XAImage":
        """Reduces noise in the image by sharpening areas with a luminance delta below the specified noise leve..."""
    def pixellate((self, pixel_size: float = 8.0)) -> "XAImage":
        """Pixellates the image."""
    def outline((self, threshold: float = 0.1)) -> "XAImage":
        """Outlines detected edges within the image in black, leaving the rest transparent."""
    def invert((self)) -> "XAImage":
        """Inverts the color of the image."""
    def sepia((self, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImage":
        """Applies a sepia filter to the image; maps all colors of the image to shades of brown."""
    def vignette((self, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImage":
        """Applies vignette shading to the corners of the image."""
    def depth_of_field((
        self,
        focal_region: Union[tuple[tuple[int, int], tuple[int, int]], None] = None,
        intensity: float = 10.0,
        focal_region_saturation: float = 1.5,
    )) -> "XAImage":
        """Applies a depth of field filter to the image, simulating a tilt & shift effect."""
    def crystallize((self, crystal_size: float = 20.0)) -> "XAImage":
        """Applies a crystallization filter to the image. Creates polygon-shaped color blocks by aggregating pi..."""
    def comic((self)) -> "XAImage":
        """Applies a comic filter to the image. Outlines edges and applies a color halftone effect."""
    def pointillize((self, point_size: float = 20.0)) -> "XAImage":
        """Applies a pointillization filter to the image."""
    def bloom((self, intensity: float = 0.5)) -> "XAImage":
        """Applies a bloom effect to the image. Softens edges and adds a glow."""
    def monochrome((self, color: XAColor, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImage":
        """Remaps the colors of the image to shades of the specified color."""
    def bump((
        self,
        center: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None,
        radius: float = 300.0,
        curvature: float = 0.5,
    )) -> "XAImage":
        """Creates a concave (inward) or convex (outward) bump at the specified location within the image."""
    def pinch((
        self, center: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None, intensity: float = 0.5
    )) -> "XAImage":
        """Creates an inward pinch distortion at the specified location within the image."""
    def twirl((
        self,
        center: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None,
        radius: float = 300.0,
        angle: float = 3.14,
    )) -> "XAImage":
        """Creates a twirl distortion by rotating pixels around the specified location within the image."""
    def auto_enhance((
        self,
        correct_red_eye: bool = False,
        crop_to_features: bool = False,
        correct_rotation: bool = False,
    )) -> "XAImage":
        """Attempts to enhance the image by applying suggested filters."""
    def flip_horizontally((self)) -> "XAImage":
        """Flips the image horizontally."""
    def flip_vertically((self)) -> "XAImage":
        """Flips the image vertically."""
    def rotate((self, degrees: float)) -> "XAImage":
        """Rotates the image clockwise by the specified number of degrees."""
    def crop((
        self, size: tuple[int, int], corner: tuple[int, int] = (0, 0)
    )) -> "XAImage":
        """Crops the image to the specified dimensions."""
    def scale((
        self, scale_factor_x: float, scale_factor_y: Union[float, None] = None
    )) -> "XAImage":
        """Scales the image by the specified horizontal and vertical factors."""
    def resize((self, width: int, height: Union[int, None] = None)) -> "XAImage":
        """Resizes the image to the specified width and height."""
    def save((self, file_path: Union[XAPath, str, None] = None)):
        """Saves the image to a file on the disk. Saves to the original file (if there was one) by default."""
    def get_clipboard_representation((self)) -> "AppKit.NSImage":
        """Gets a clipboard-codable representation of the iimage."""
    def __eq__((self, other)):

        """Pauses playback of all sounds in the list."""

        """Resumes playback of all sounds in the list."""

        """Stops playback of all sounds in the list."""

    )) -> list[Union["AppKit.NSSound", "AppKit.NSURL", str]]:

class XASound(X, A, O, b, j, e, c, t, ,,  , X, A, C, l, i, p, b, o, a, r, d, C, o, d, a, b, l, e):
    """A class for playing and interacting with audio files and data."""
    def __init__((self, sound_reference: Union[str, XAURL, XAPath])):
    def open((
        *sound_references: Union[str, XAPath, list[Union[str, XAPath]]]
    )) -> Union["XASound", XASoundList]:
        """Initializes one or more sounds from files."""
    def beep((self)):
        """Plays the system Beep sound."""
    def play((self, new_thread = False)) -> "XASound":
        """Plays the sound from the beginning."""
    def pause((self)) -> "XASound":
        """Pauses the sound. ..."""
    def resume((self)) -> "XASound":
        """Plays the sound starting from the time it was last paused at."""
    def stop((self)) -> "XASound":
        """Stops playback of the sound and rewinds it to the beginning."""
    def set_volume((self, volume: float)) -> "XASound":
        """Sets the volume of the sound."""
    def volume((self)) -> float:
        """Returns the current volume of the sound."""
    def loop((self, times: int)) -> "XASound":
        """Plays the sound the specified number of times."""
    def trim((self, start_time: float, end_time: float)) -> "XASound":
        """Trims the sound to the specified start and end time, in seconds."""
    def save((self, file_path: Union[XAPath, str])):
        """Saves the sound to the specified file path."""
    def get_clipboard_representation((
        self,
    )) -> list[Union["AppKit.NSSound", "AppKit.NSURL", str]]:
        """Gets a clipboard-codable representation of the sound."""

    """Whether the media can be ejected (floppies, CD's, and so on)."""

    """The server on which the disk resides, AFP volumes only."""

    """Whether this disk is the boot disk."""

    """The zone in which the disk's server resides, AFP volumes only."""

def edges((self, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImage":
    """Detects the edges in the image and highlights them colorfully, blackening other areas of the image."""

def gaussian_blur((self, intensity: float = 10)) -> "XAImage":
    """Blurs the image using a Gaussian filter."""

def reduce_noise((
        self, noise_level: float = 0.02, sharpness: float = 0.4
    )) -> "XAImage":
    """Reduces noise in the image by sharpening areas with a luminance delta below the specified noise leve..."""

def pixellate((self, pixel_size: float = 8.0)) -> "XAImage":
    """Pixellates the image."""

def outline((self, threshold: float = 0.1)) -> "XAImage":
    """Outlines detected edges within the image in black, leaving the rest transparent."""

def invert((self)) -> "XAImage":
    """Inverts the color of the image."""

def sepia((self, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImage":
    """Applies a sepia filter to the image; maps all colors of the image to shades of brown."""

def vignette((self, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImage":
    """Applies vignette shading to the corners of the image."""

def depth_of_field((
        self,
        focal_region: Union[tuple[tuple[int, int], tuple[int, int]], None] = None,
        intensity: float = 10.0,
        focal_region_saturation: float = 1.5,
    )) -> "XAImage":
    """Applies a depth of field filter to the image, simulating a tilt & shift effect."""

def crystallize((self, crystal_size: float = 20.0)) -> "XAImage":
    """Applies a crystallization filter to the image. Creates polygon-shaped color blocks by aggregating pi..."""

def comic((self)) -> "XAImage":
    """Applies a comic filter to the image. Outlines edges and applies a color halftone effect."""

def pointillize((self, point_size: float = 20.0)) -> "XAImage":
    """Applies a pointillization filter to the image."""

def bloom((self, intensity: float = 0.5)) -> "XAImage":
    """Applies a bloom effect to the image. Softens edges and adds a glow."""

def monochrome((self, color: XAColor, intensity: float = 1.0)) -> "XAImage":
    """Remaps the colors of the image to shades of the specified color."""

def bump((
        self,
        center: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None,
        radius: float = 300.0,
        curvature: float = 0.5,
    )) -> "XAImage":
    """Creates a concave (inward) or convex (outward) bump at the specified location within the image."""

def pinch((
        self, center: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None, intensity: float = 0.5
    )) -> "XAImage":
    """Creates an inward pinch distortion at the specified location within the image."""

def twirl((
        self,
        center: Union[tuple[int, int], None] = None,
        radius: float = 300.0,
        angle: float = 3.14,
    )) -> "XAImage":
    """Creates a twirl distortion by rotating pixels around the specified location within the image."""

def auto_enhance((
        self,
        correct_red_eye: bool = False,
        crop_to_features: bool = False,
        correct_rotation: bool = False,
    )) -> "XAImage":
    """Attempts to enhance the image by applying suggested filters."""

def flip_horizontally((self)) -> "XAImage":
    """Flips the image horizontally."""

def flip_vertically((self)) -> "XAImage":
    """Flips the image vertically."""

def rotate((self, degrees: float)) -> "XAImage":
    """Rotates the image clockwise by the specified number of degrees."""

def crop((
        self, size: tuple[int, int], corner: tuple[int, int] = (0, 0)
    )) -> "XAImage":
    """Crops the image to the specified dimensions."""

def scale((
        self, scale_factor_x: float, scale_factor_y: Union[float, None] = None
    )) -> "XAImage":
    """Scales the image by the specified horizontal and vertical factors."""

def resize((self, width: int, height: Union[int, None] = None)) -> "XAImage":
    """Resizes the image to the specified width and height."""

def save((self, file_path: Union[XAPath, str, None] = None)):
    """Saves the image to a file on the disk. Saves to the original file (if there was one) by default."""

def get_clipboard_representation((self)) -> "AppKit.NSImage":
    """Gets a clipboard-codable representation of the iimage."""

from typing import Any, Union

class XAProtocol:
    """A meta-class for protocols that other classes can adhere to."""

    def show((self)) -> "XAShowable":
        """Shows the object. ..."""

        """Selects the object This may open a new window, depending on which kind of object and application it ..."""

    """A protocol for classes that can be deleted via a :func:`delete` method."""
    def delete((self)):
        """Deletes the object. ..."""

        print_properties: Union[dict, None] = None,
        show_dialog: bool = True,
        new_thread=True,
    )) -> "XAPrintable":
        """Prints the object. ..."""

    )):
        """Closes the object. ..."""

    def get_clipboard_representation((self)) -> Any:
        """Gets a clipboard-codable representation of the object."""

class XAArcApplication(X, A, B, a, s, e, S, c, r, i, p, t, a, b, l, e, ., X, A, S, B, A, p, p, l, i, c, a, t, i, o, n, ,,  , X, A, C, a, n, O, p, e, n, P, a, t, h):

        """Returns a list of windows, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""

        self,
        specifier: Union[str, "XAArcApplication.ObjectType"],
        properties: Union[dict, None] = None,
        data: Any = None,
    )) -> XABase.XAObject:
        """Creates a new element of the given specifier class without adding it to any list."""

    """The object types available for creation in Arc."""

    """Window modes for Arc windows."""

    """Tab locations for Arc tabs."""

class XAArcWindowList(X, A, B, a, s, e, S, c, r, i, p, t, a, b, l, e, ., X, A, S, B, W, i, n, d, o, w, L, i, s, t):
    """A wrapper around lists of windows that employs fast enumeration techniques."""
    def __init__((self, properties: dict, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)):
    def id((self)) -> list["str"]:
        """The unique identifier of the window."""
    def name((self)) -> list["str"]:
        """The full title of the window."""
    def index((self)) -> list["int"]:
        """The index of the window, ordered front to back."""
    def closeable((self)) -> list["bool"]:
        """Whether the window has a close box."""
    def minimizable((self)) -> list["bool"]:
        """Whether the window can be minimized."""
    def minimized((self)) -> list["bool"]:
        """Whether the window is currently minimized."""
    def resizable((self)) -> list["bool"]:
        """Whether the window can be resized."""
    def visible((self)) -> list["bool"]:
        """Whether the window is currently visible."""
    def zoomable((self)) -> list["bool"]:
        """Whether the window can be zoomed."""
    def zoomed((self)) -> list[bool]:
        """Whether the window is currently zoomed."""
    def active_tab((self)) -> list["XAArcTab"]:
        """Returns the currently selected tab"""
    def active_space((self)) -> list["XAArcSpace"]:
        """Returns the currently active space"""
    def incognito((self)) -> list["bool"]:
        """Whether the window is an incognito window."""
    def mode((self)) -> list["XAArcApplication.WindowMode"]:
        """Represents the mode of the window which can be 'normal' or 'incognito', can be set only once during ..."""
    def by_id((self, id: str)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose id matches the given id."""
    def by_name((self, name: str)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose name matches the given name."""
    def by_index((self, index: int)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose index matches the given index."""
    def by_closeable((self, closeable: bool)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose closeable matches the given closeable."""
    def by_minimizable((self, minimizable: bool)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose minimizable matches the given minimizable."""
    def by_minimized((self, minimized: bool)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose minimized matches the given minimized."""
    def by_resizable((self, resizable: bool)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose resizable matches the given resizable."""
    def by_visible((self, visible: bool)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose visible matches the given visible."""
    def by_zoomable((self, zoomable: bool)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose zoomable matches the given zoomable."""
    def by_zoomed((self, zoomed: bool)) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose zoomed matches the given zoomed."""
    def by_active_tab((self, active_tab: "XAArcTab")) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose active_tab matches the given active_tab."""
    def by_active_space((self, active_space: "XAArcSpace")) -> "XAArcWindow":
        """Retrieves the An application's window whose active_space matches the given active_space."""

        """Retrieves the An application's window whose incognito matches the given incognito."""

from enum import Enum
from typing import Any, Union
import AppKit
from PyXA import XABase
from PyXA import XABaseScriptable
from ..XAProtocols import XACanOpenPath

class XAAutomatorApplication(X, A, B, a, s, e, S, c, r, i, p, t, a, b, l, e, ., X, A, S, B, A, p, p, l, i, c, a, t, i, o, n, ,,  , X, A, C, a, n, O, p, e, n, P, a, t, h):
    """A class for managing and interacting with Automator.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def open((self, path: Union[str, AppKit.NSURL])) -> "XAAutomatorWorkflow":
        """Opens the file at the given filepath."""
    def add((
        self,
        action: "XAAutomatorAction",
        workflow: "XAAutomatorWorkflow",
        index: int = -1,
    )) -> "XAAutomatorApplication":
        """Adds the specified action to a workflow at the specified index."""
    def documents((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAAutomatorDocumentList":
        """Returns a list of documents, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def automator_actions((
        self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None
    )) -> "XAAutomatorActionList":
        """Returns a list of Automator actions, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def variables((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAAutomatorVariableList":
        """Returns a list of Automator variables, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""

        """Returns a list of documents, as PyXA-wrapped objects, matching the given filter."""

        self,

        properties: Union[dict, None] = None,
        data: Any = None,
    )) -> XABase.XAObject:
        """Creates a new element of the given specifier class without adding it to any list."""

    )):

from PyXA import XABase

class XACalculatorApplication(X, A, B, a, s, e, ., X, A, A, p, p, l, i, c, a, t, i, o, n):
    """A class for managing and interacting with Calculator.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def __load_buttons((self)):
        """Loads references to primary buttons of the calculator."""
    def open_about_panel((self)):
        """Opens the "About Calculator" panel. Mimics clicking File->About Calculator."""
    def save_tape((self)):
        """Opens the "save tape" dialog. Mimics clicking File->Save Tape As..."""
    def open_page_setup((self)):
        """Opens the page setup dialog. Mimics clicking File->Page Setup..."""
    def print_tape((self)):
        """Opens the print tape dialog. Mimics clicking File->Print Tape..."""
    def copy_value((self)):
        """Copies the current value of the calculator result. Mimics clicking Edit->Copy."""
    def show_basic_calculator((self)):
        """Switches the view to the basic calculator. Mimics clicking View->Basic."""
    def show_scientific_calculator((self)):
        """Switches the view to the scientific calculator. Mimics clicking View->Scientific."""
    def show_programmer_calculator((self)):
        """Switches the view to the programmer calculator. Mimics clicking View->Programmer."""
    def toggle_thousands_separators((self)):
        """Toggles whether comma separators are shown at thousand intervals. Mimics clicking View->Show Thousan..."""
    def toggle_RPN_mode((self)):
        """Toggles Reverse Polish Notation. Mimics clicking View->RPN Mode."""
    def show_paper_tape((self)):
        """Opens the paper tape window. Mimics clicking Window->Show Paper Tape."""
    def show_help((self)):
        """Opens the Calculator help window. Mimics clicking Help->Calculator Help.add()"""
    def clear_value((self)):
        """Clears the current calculator output. Mimics clicking the "C" (clear) button."""
    def input((self, sequence: str)):
        """Inputs a sequence of numbers and operations into the calculator by mimicking button clicks."""
    def current_value((self)) -> float:
        """Retrieves the current value of the calculator output."""

def __init__((self, properties)):

def __load_buttons((self)):
    """Loads references to primary buttons of the calculator."""

def open_about_panel((self)):
    """Opens the "About Calculator" panel. Mimics clicking File->About Calculator."""

def save_tape((self)):
    """Opens the "save tape" dialog. Mimics clicking File->Save Tape As..."""

def open_page_setup((self)):
    """Opens the page setup dialog. Mimics clicking File->Page Setup..."""

def print_tape((self)):
    """Opens the print tape dialog. Mimics clicking File->Print Tape..."""

def copy_value((self)):
    """Copies the current value of the calculator result. Mimics clicking Edit->Copy."""

def show_basic_calculator((self)):
    """Switches the view to the basic calculator. Mimics clicking View->Basic."""

def show_scientific_calculator((self)):
    """Switches the view to the scientific calculator. Mimics clicking View->Scientific."""

def show_programmer_calculator((self)):
    """Switches the view to the programmer calculator. Mimics clicking View->Programmer."""

def toggle_thousands_separators((self)):
    """Toggles whether comma separators are shown at thousand intervals. Mimics clicking View->Show Thousan..."""

def toggle_RPN_mode((self)):
    """Toggles Reverse Polish Notation. Mimics clicking View->RPN Mode."""

def show_paper_tape((self)):
    """Opens the paper tape window. Mimics clicking Window->Show Paper Tape."""

def show_help((self)):
    """Opens the Calculator help window. Mimics clicking Help->Calculator Help.add()"""

def clear_value((self)):
    """Clears the current calculator output. Mimics clicking the "C" (clear) button."""

def input((self, sequence: str)):
    """Inputs a sequence of numbers and operations into the calculator by mimicking button clicks."""

def current_value((self)) -> float:
    """Retrieves the current value of the calculator output."""

    def save((self)):
        """Saves all changes to the address book."""
    def documents((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAContactsDocumentList":
        """Returns a list of documents, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def groups((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAContactsGroupList":
        """Returns a list of groups, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def people((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAContactsPersonList":
        """Returns a list of people, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def make((
        self,
        specifier: Union[str, "XAContactsApplication.ObjectType"],
        properties: dict = None,
        data: Any = None,
    )):
        """Creates a new element of the given specifier class without adding it to any list."""

class ObjectType(E, n, u, m):
    """Object types that can be created using :func:`XAContactsApplication.make`."""

class Format(E, n, u, m):
    """Format options when saving documents."""

class ServiceType(E, n, u, m):
    """Service types for social media accounts."""

from CoreServices import DCSCopyTextDefinition
from PyXA import XABase

class XADictionaryApplication(X, A, B, a, s, e, ., X, A, A, p, p, l, i, c, a, t, i, o, n):
    """A class for managing and interacting with Dictionary.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def define((self, word: str)) -> str:
        """Gets the definition of a word in raw text form."""
    def open_about_panel((self)):
        """Opens the "About Dictionary" panel. Mimics clicking File->About Dictionary."""
    def open_preferences((self)):
        """Opens the preferences window for the Dictionary application. Mimics clicking File->Preferences..."""
    def new_window((self)):
        """Opens a new Dictionary window."""
    def new_tab((self)):
        """Opens a new Dictionary tab."""
    def open_dictionaries_folder((self)):
        """Opens the folder containing custom/downloaded dictionaries."""
    def print((self)):
        """Opens the dictionary app's print dialog."""
    def paste((self)):
        """Pastes the current contents of the clipboard into the selected item, if there is one."""
    def start_dictation((self)):
        """Begins dictation to fill the selected item, if there is one."""
    def go_back((self)):
        """Goes to the previous page/definition."""
    def go_forward((self)):
        """Goes to the next page/definition."""
    def view_front_back_matter((self)):
        """Displays the front/back matter of the selected dictionary."""
    def fullscreen((self)):
        """Toggles fullscreen for the current Dictionary window."""
    def show_help((self)):
        """Displays the help window for Dictionary.app."""
    def switch_to_all((self)):
        """Switches to searching all installed dictionaries."""
    def switch_to_new_oxford((self)):
        """Switches to searching the New Oxford American Dictionary."""
    def switch_to_oxford_thesaurus((self)):
        """Switches to searching the Oxford American Writer's Thesaurus."""
    def switch_to_apple_dictionary((self)):
        """Switches to searching the Apple Dictionary."""
    def switch_to_wikipedia((self)):
        """Switches to searching Wikipedia."""
    def search((self, term: str)):
        """Searches the currently selected dictionary."""
    def search_all((self, term: str)):
        """Searches the provided term in all dictionaries"""
    def search_new_oxford((self, term: str)):
        """Searches the provided term in the New Oxford American Dictionary"""
    def search_oxford_thesaurus((self, term: str)):
        """Searches the provided term in the Oxford American Writer's Thesaurus"""
    def search_apple_dictionary((self, term: str)):
        """Searches the provided term in the Apple Dictionary"""
    def search_wikipedia((self, term: str)):
        """Searches the provided term in Wikipedia"""

class XADraftsApplication(X, A, B, a, s, e, S, c, r, i, p, t, a, b, l, e, ., X, A, S, B, A, p, p, l, i, c, a, t, i, o, n, ,,  , X, A, C, a, n, O, p, e, n, P, a, t, h):
    """A class for managing and interacting with Drafts.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def new_draft((self, content: str)) -> "XADraftsDraft":
        """Creates a new draft with the given name and content"""
    def drafts((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XADraftsDraftList":
        """Returns a list of drafts, as PyXA-wrapped objects, matching the given filter."""
    def make((
        self,
        specifier: Union[str, "XADraftsApplication.ObjectType"],
        properties: dict = None,
        data: Any = None,
    )):
        """Creates a new element of the given specifier class without adding it to any list."""

class ObjectType(E, n, u, m):
    """Object types that can be created using :func:`XADraftsApplication.make`."""

class XADraftsDraftList(X, A, B, a, s, e, ., X, A, L, i, s, t):
    """A wrapper around a list of drafts."""
    def __init__((self, properties: dict, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)):
    def id((self)) -> list[str]:
    def name((self)) -> list[str]:
    def content((self)) -> list[str]:
    def flagged((self)) -> list[bool]:
    def tags((self)) -> list[list[str]]:
    def created_at((self)) -> list[datetime]:
    def modified_at((self)) -> list[datetime]:
    def accessed_at((self)) -> list[datetime]:
    def permalink((self)) -> list[str]:
    def by_id((self, id: str)) -> Union["XADraftsDraft", None]:
    def by_name((self, name: str)) -> Union["XADraftsDraft", None]:
    def by_content((self, content: str)) -> Union["XADraftsDraft", None]:
    def by_flagged((self, flagged: bool)) -> Union["XADraftsDraft", None]:
    def by_tags((self, tags: list[str])) -> Union["XADraftsDraft", None]:
    def by_created_at((self, created_at: datetime)) -> Union["XADraftsDraft", None]:
    def by_modified_at((self, modified_at: datetime)) -> Union["XADraftsDraft", None]:

    )) -> Union["XAFinderItem", None]:

        self, container: "XAFinderContainer"
    )) -> Union["XAFinderItem", None]:

    def by_icon((self, icon: XAImage)) -> Union["XAFinderItem", None]:
    def by_information_window((
        self, information_window: "XAFinderInformationWindow"
    )) -> Union["XAFinderItem", None]:
    def get_clipboard_representation((self)) -> list[Union[str, AppKit.NSURL]]:
        """Gets a clipboard-codable representation of each item in the list."""
    def __repr__((self)):

    """A generic class with methods common to the various item classes of Finder."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def reveal((self)) -> "XAFinderItem":
        """Reveals the item in the frontmost Finder window."""
    def copy((self)) -> "XAFinderItem":
        """Copies the item to the clipboard."""
    def move_to((
        self, new_path: Union[str, AppKit.NSURL], overwrite: bool = False
    )) -> "XAFinderItem":
        """Moves the item to the specified path."""
    def exists((self)) -> bool:
        """Checks whether the item exists on the disk or not."""
    def open((self)):
        """Opens the item in its default application."""
    def get_clipboard_representation((self)) -> list[Union[str, AppKit.NSURL]]:
        """Gets a clipboard-codable representation of the item."""
    def __repr__((self)):

    """The name of the application."""

    """Whether Finder is currently visible."""

    """Whether Finder is the active application."""

    """The system software version."""

    """The version of Finder"""

    """The currently selected items in Finder."""

from datetime import timedelta
from PyXA import XABaseScriptable

class XAFlowApplication(X, A, B, a, s, e, S, c, r, i, p, t, a, b, l, e, ., X, A, S, B, A, p, p, l, i, c, a, t, i, o, n):
    """A class for managing and interacting with Flow.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def start((self)) -> str:
        """Starts or resumes the current session."""
    def stop((self)) -> str:
        """Stops the current session."""
    def skip((self)) -> str:
        """Skips the current session."""
    def previous((self)) -> str:
        """Reloads the current or previous session."""
    def reset((self)) -> str:
        """Resets the session progress."""
    def show((self)) -> str:
        """Shows the Flow app window."""
    def hide((self)) -> str:
        """Hides the Flow app window."""
    def get_phase((self)) -> str:
        """Gets the current phase (e.g. Flow or Break)"""
    def get_time((self)) -> timedelta:
        """Gets the remaining time of the current session."""

def __init__((self, properties)):

def start((self)) -> str:
    """Starts or resumes the current session."""

def stop((self)) -> str:
    """Stops the current session."""

def skip((self)) -> str:
    """Skips the current session."""

def previous((self)) -> str:
    """Reloads the current or previous session."""

def reset((self)) -> str:
    """Resets the session progress."""

def show((self)) -> str:
    """Shows the Flow app window."""

def hide((self)) -> str:
    """Hides the Flow app window."""

def get_phase((self)) -> str:
    """Gets the current phase (e.g. Flow or Break)"""

def get_time((self)) -> timedelta:
    """Gets the remaining time of the current session."""

    """A class for managing and interacting with messages in Mail.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def open((self)) -> "XAMailMessage":
        """Opens the message in a separate window."""
    def forward((self, open_window: bool = True)) -> "XAMailOutgoingMessage":
    def redirect((self, open_window: bool = True)) -> "XAMailOutgoingMessage":
    def reply((
        self, open_window: bool = True, reply_all: bool = False
    )) -> "XAMailOutgoingMessage":
    def delete((self)):
        """Permanently deletes the message."""
    def bcc_recipients((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAMailBccRecipientList":
        """Returns a list of Bcc recipients matching the filter."""
    def cc_recpients((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAMailCcRecipientList":
        """Returns a list of Cc recipients matching the filter."""
    def recipients((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAMailRecipientList":
        """Returns a list of mail recipients matching the filter."""
    def to_recipients((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAMailToRecipientList":
        """Returns a list of primary recipients matching the filter."""
    def headers((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAMailHeaderList":
        """Returns a list of message headers matching the filter."""
    def mail_attachments((self, filter: dict = None)) -> "XAMailAttachmentList":
        """Returns a list of message attachments matching the filter."""
    def __repr__((self)):

class XAMailOutgoingMessageList(X, A, B, a, s, e, ., X, A, L, i, s, t):
    """A wrapper around lists of outgoing messages that employs fast enumeration techniques."""
    def __init__((self, properties: dict, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)):
    def sender((self)) -> list[str]:
    def subject((self)) -> list[str]:
    def content((self)) -> XABase.XATextList:
    def visible((self)) -> list[bool]:
    def message_signature((self)) -> XAMailSignatureList:
    def id((self)) -> list[int]:
    def by_sender((self, sender: str)) -> "XAMailOutgoingMessage":
    def by_subject((self, subject: str)) -> "XAMailOutgoingMessage":
    def by_content((self, content: XABase.XAText)) -> "XAMailOutgoingMessage":
    def by_visible((self, visible: bool)) -> "XAMailOutgoingMessage":
    def by_message_signature((
        self, message_signature: XAMailSignature
    )) -> "XAMailOutgoingMessage":
    def by_id((self, id: int)) -> "XAMailOutgoingMessage":
    def __repr__((self)):

class XAMailOutgoingMessage(X, A, B, a, s, e, ., X, A, O, b, j, e, c, t):
    """A class for managing and interacting with outgoing messages in Mail.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def send((self)) -> bool:
    def save((self)):
    def close((
        self, save: XAMailApplication.SaveOption = XAMailApplication.SaveOption.YES
    )):
    def delete((self)):
        """Permanently deletes the outgoing message."""
    def __repr__((self)):

    def delete_message((self)) -> list[bool]:

    def forward_message((self)) -> list[str]:
    def mark_flagged((self)) -> list[bool]:
    def mark_flag_index((self)) -> list[int]:

    def play_sound((self)) -> list[str]:
    def redirect_message((self)) -> list[str]:
    def reply_text((self)) -> list[str]:
    def run_script((self)) -> list[str]:
    def all_conditions_must_be_met((self)) -> list[bool]:
    def copy_message((self)) -> XAMailboxList:
    def move_message((self)) -> XAMailboxList:
    def highlight_text_using_color((self)) -> list[bool]:
    def enabled((self)) -> list[bool]:
    def name((self)) -> list[str]:
    def should_copy_message((self)) -> list[bool]:
    def should_move_message((self)) -> list[bool]:
    def stop_evaluating_rules((self)) -> list[bool]:
    def by_color_message((
        self, color_message: XAMailApplication.HighlightColor
    )) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_delete_message((self, deleteMessage: bool)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_forward_text((self, forward_text: str)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_forward_message((self, forward_message: str)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_mark_flagged((self, mark_flagged: bool)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_mark_flag_index((self, mark_flag_index: int)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_mark_read((self, mark_read: bool)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_play_sound((self, play_sound: str)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_redirect_message((self, redirect_message: str)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_reply_text((self, reply_text: str)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_run_script((self, run_script: str)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_all_conditions_must_be_met((
        self, all_conditions_must_be_met: bool
    )) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_copy_message((self, copy_message: XAMailbox)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_move_message((self, move_message: XAMailbox)) -> "XAMailRule":
    def by_highlight_text_using_color((
        self, highlight_text_using_color: bool
    )) -> "XAMailRule":

        self, qualifier: XAMailApplication.RuleQualifier

from typing import Literal, Union
from AppKit import NSPredicate
from PyXA import XABase
from .SystemEvents import XASystemEventsUIElement, XASystemEventsUIElementList

class XAMapsApplication(X, A, B, a, s, e, ., X, A, A, p, p, l, i, c, a, t, i, o, n):
    """A class for managing and interacting with Maps.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def toggle_sidebar((self)):
        """Toggles the sidebar."""
    def search((
        self,
        query: Union[str, XABase.XAText],
        latitude: Union[float, None] = None,
        longitude: Union[float, None] = None,
        exact: bool = True,
    )):
        """Searches Maps for the given query, centered at the (optional) specified location."""
    def zoom_in((self)) -> "XAMapsApplication":
        """Zoom in on the currently centered location of the map."""
    def zoom_out((self)) -> "XAMapsApplication":
        """Zoom out on the currently centered location of the map."""
    def orient_north((self)) -> "XAMapsApplication":
        """Orients the map with North facing upward."""
    def show_address((self, address: str)):
        """Centers the map at the specified address."""
    def show_coordinate((self, latitude: float, longitude: float)):
        """Centers the map at the specified coordinate."""
    def drop_pin((
        self, latitude: float, longitude: float, name: Union[str, None] = None
    )):
        """Drops at pin at the specified coordinate."""
    def directions_to((
        self,
        destination_address: Union[str, XABase.XAText],
        source_address: Union[str, XABase.XAText, None] = None,
        transport_type: Union[
            Literal[
                "d",
                "driving",
                "w",
                "walking",
                "p",
                "pt",
                "r",
                "public transit",
                "transit",
            ],
            None,
        ] = None,
    )):
        """Queries for directions to the destination address, optionally starting from a source address."""
    def new_tab((self)):
        """Opens a new tab. ..."""
    def tabs((self)) -> "XAMapsTabList":
        """Gets a list of tabs."""
    def sidebar_locations((self)) -> "XAMapsSidebarLocationList":
        """Gets a list of sidebar locations."""

    """A class for managing and interacting with Messages.app"""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def send((self, message: str, chat: "XAMessagesChat")):
        """Sends a message to the specified chat."""
    def print((self, object: XABase.XAObject, show_dialog: bool = True)):
    def documents((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAMessagesDocumentList":
        """Returns a list of documents, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""

        """Returns a list of chats, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def participants((
        self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None
    )) -> "XAMessagesParticipantList":
        """Returns a list of participants, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def accounts((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAMessagesAccountList":
        """Returns a list of accounts, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def file_transfers((
        self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None
    )) -> "XAMessagesFileTransferList":
        """Returns a list of file transfers, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""

        """Toggles the playing/paused state of the current track."""

        """Pauses the current track."""

        """Stops playback of the current track. Subsequent playback will start from the beginning of the track."""

        """Advances to the next track in the current playlist."""
    def back_track((self)) -> "XAMusicApplication":
        """Restarts the current track or returns to the previous track if playback is currently at the start."""
    def previous_track((self)) -> "XAMusicApplication":
        """Returns to the previous track in the current playlist."""
    def fast_forward((self)) -> "XAMusicApplication":
        """Repeated skip forward in the track until resume() is called."""
    def rewind((self)) -> "XAMusicApplication":
        """Repeatedly skip backward in the track until resume() is called."""
    def resume((self)) -> "XAMusicApplication":
        """Returns to normal playback after calls to fast_forward() or rewind()."""
    def open_location((self, video_url: str)) -> "XAMusicApplication":

        self, object_description: str
    )) -> Union["XAMusicPlaylist", None]:

class XAMusicPlaylist(X, A, M, u, s, i, c, I, t, e, m):
    """A playlist in Music.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def search((
        self,
        query: str,
        type: Literal["all", "artists", "albums", "displayed", "tracks"] = "displayed",
    )):
    def move((self, location: Union["XAMusicSource", "XAMusicFolderPlaylist"])):
        """Moves the playlist to the specified source or folder playlist."""
    def duplicate((
        self, location: Union["XAMusicSource", "XAMusicFolderPlaylist", None] = None
    )):
        """Duplicates the playlist to the specified source or folder playlist."""
    def play((self)):
        """Starts playback of the playlist, beginning with the first track in the list."""
    def add_tracks((self, *tracks: Union["XAMusicTrackList", list["XAMusicTrack"]])):
        """Add one or more tracks to this playlist."""
    def tracks((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAMusicTrackList":
        """Returns a list of tracks, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def artworks((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAMusicArtworkList":
        """Returns a list of artworks, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""

class XAMusicTrack(X, A, M, u, s, i, c, I, t, e, m):
    """A class for managing and interacting with tracks in Music.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def move((self, location: Union[XAMusicPlaylist, XAMusicSource])):
        """Moves the track to the specified location, copying it if appropriate."""
    def duplicate((self, location: Union[XAMusicPlaylist, XAMusicSource])):
        """Duplicates the track at the specified location."""
    def select((self)) -> "XAMusicItem":
        """Selects the item. ..."""
    def play((self)) -> "XAMusicItem":
        """Plays the item. ..."""
    def artworks((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAMusicArtworkList":
        """Returns a list of artworks, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""

    """Repeated skip forward in the track until resume() is called."""

    """Repeatedly skip backward in the track until resume() is called."""

    """Returns to normal playback after calls to fast_forward() or rewind()."""

class XANotesApplication(
,  ,  ,  ,  , X, A, B, a, s, e, S, c, r, i, p, t, a, b, l, e, ., X, A, S, B, A, p, p, l, i, c, a, t, i, o, n, ,,  , X, A, C, a, n, O, p, e, n, P, a, t, h, ,,  , X, A, C, a, n, P, r, i, n, t, P, a, t, h,

    """A class for interacting with Notes.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def open((self, file_ref: Union[XABase.XAPath, str])) -> "XANote":
    def documents((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XANotesDocumentList":
        """Returns a list of documents, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def notes((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XANoteList":
        """Returns a list of notes, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def folders((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XANotesFolderList":
        """Returns a list of Notes folders, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def accounts((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XANotesAccountList":
        """Returns a list of Notes accounts, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def attachments((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XANotesAttachmentList":
        """Returns a list of attachments, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def new_note((
        self,
        name: str = "New Note",
        body: Union[str, XABase.XAText] = "",
        folder: "XANotesFolder" = None,
    )) -> "XANote":
        """Creates a new note with the given name and body text in the given folder."""
    def new_folder((
        self, name: str = "New Folder", account: "XANotesAccount" = None
    )) -> "XANotesFolder":
        """Creates a new Notes folder with the given name."""

        self,
        specifier: Union[str, "XANotesApplication.ObjectType"],
        properties: Union[dict, None] = None,
        data: Union[XABase.XAPath, str, None] = None,
    )):

class XAOmniOutlinerRow(X, A, B, a, s, e, ., X, A, O, b, j, e, c, t):
    """A row object in OmniOutliner.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def expand_all((
        self,
        items: Union[
            "XAOmniOutlinerRow", list["XAOmniOutlinerRow"], XAOmniOutlinerRowList, None
        ] = None,
    )):
        """Expands a row or list of rows."""
    def collapse_all((
        self,
        items: Union[
            "XAOmniOutlinerRow", list["XAOmniOutlinerRow"], XAOmniOutlinerRowList, None
        ] = None,
    )):
        """Collapses a row or list of rows."""
    def indent((self)):
        """Indents the row. ..."""
    def outdent((self)):
        """Outdents the row. ..."""
    def add((self, items: Union[XABase.XAObject, list[XABase.XAObject]])):
        """Adds objects to the row."""
    def add_to((self, destination: XABase.XAObject)):
        """Adds the row to a location."""
    def remove((self, items: Union[XABase.XAObject, list[XABase.XAObject]])):
        """Remove objects from the row."""
    def remove_from((self, container: XABase.XAObject)):
        """Removes the row from a location."""
    def group((
        self,
        rows: Union[
            "XAOmniOutlinerRow",
            "XAOmniOutlinerRowList",
            list["XAOmniOutlinerRow"],
            None,
        ] = None,
    )):
        """Increase the outline level of a list of rows by creating a new parent row for them and moving under ..."""
    def ungroup((
        self,
        rows: Union[
            "XAOmniOutlinerRow",
            "XAOmniOutlinerRowList",
            list["XAOmniOutlinerRow"],
            None,
        ] = None,
    )):
        """Decrease the outline level of all children of a row, moving them left one step."""
    def hoist((
        self,
        rows: Union[
            "XAOmniOutlinerRow",
            "XAOmniOutlinerRowList",
            list["XAOmniOutlinerRow"],
            None,
        ] = None,
    )):
        """Hide all rows in the outline, except for the descendants of the row passed to this command."""
    def pbcopy((
        self,
        items: list[XABase.XAObject],
        type: Union[str, list[str], None] = None,
        clipboard_name: Union[str, None] = None,
    )):
        """Copies one or more nodes to the clipboard."""
    def pbpaste((
        self, location: XABase.XAObject, clipboard_name: Union[str, None] = None
    )):
        """Pastes nodes from the clipboard."""
    def import_file((self, file: Union[str, XABase.XAPath])):
        """Imports a file, as rows, to a specified location. Returns the list of imported rows."""
    def ancestors((
        self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None
    )) -> "XAOmniOutlinerAncestorList":
        """Returns a list of ancestors, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def cells((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAOmniOutlinerCellList":
        """Returns a list of cells, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def rows((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAOmniOutlinerRowList":
        """Returns a list of rows, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def children((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAOmniOutlinerChildList":
        """Returns a list of children, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def conduit_setting_domains((
        self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None
    )) -> "XAOmniOutlinerConduitSettingDomainList":
        """Returns a list of conduit setting domains, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def following_siblings((
        self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None
    )) -> "XAOmniOutlinerFollowingSiblingList":
        """Returns a list of following siblings, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def leaves((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XAOmniOutlinerLeafList":
        """Returns a list of leaves, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""
    def paragraphs((self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None)) -> "XABase.XAParagraphList":
        """Returns a list of paragraphs, as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""

        self, filter: Union[dict, None] = None
    )) -> "XAOmniOutlinerPathComponentList":
        """Returns a row path, or list of path components as PyXA objects, matching the given filter."""

class XAOmniWebApplication(X, A, B, a, s, e, S, c, r, i, p, t, a, b, l, e, ., X, A, S, B, A, p, p, l, i, c, a, t, i, o, n, ,,  , X, A, C, a, n, O, p, e, n, P, a, t, h, ,,  , X, A, C, a, n, P, r, i, n, t, P, a, t, h):
    """A class for managing and interacting with OmniWeb.app."""
    def __init__((self, properties)):
    def documents((self, filter: dict = None)) -> Union["XAOmniWebDocumentList", None]:
        """Returns a list of documents, as PyXA-wrapped objects, matching the given filter."""
    def workspaces((self, filter: dict = None)) -> Union["XAOmniWebWorkspaceList", None]:
        """Returns a list of workspaces, as PyXA-wrapped objects, matching the given filter."""
    def browsers((self, filter: dict = None)) -> Union["XAOmniWebBrowserList", None]:
        """Returns a list of browsers, as PyXA-wrapped objects, matching the given filter."""
    def bookmarks_documents((
        self, filter: dict = None
    )) -> Union["XAOmniWebBookmarksDocumentList", None]:
        """Returns a list of bookmarks documents, as PyXA-wrapped objects, matching the given filter."""
    def open((self, target: Union[XABase.XAURL, XABase.XAPath, str])) -> None:
        """Opens the file/website at the given filepath/URL."""
    def list_windows((self)) -> list[int]:
        """Returns a list of the numeric IDs of all open browser windows."""
    def get_window_info((self)) -> dict:
        """Returns a dictionary containing information about the frontmost window."""
    def make((self, specifier: Union[str, 'XAOmniWebApplication.ObjectType'], properties: Union[dict, None] = None, data: Any = None)) -> XABase.XAObject:
        """Creates a new element of the given specifier class without adding it to any list."""

        """Returns a list of the disks in Path Finder."""

        """Empties the trash."""
